proof: function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0.first.distance(x1.first).max(x0.second.distance(x1.second)) = pair_distance[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[M, N](p, q)
function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0.first.distance(x1.first).max(x0.second.distance(x1.second)) = pair_distance[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[M, N](p, q)
function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0.first.distance(x1.first).max(x0.second.distance(x1.second)) = pair_distance[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[M, N](p, p)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.max(x1) = x0 or x0.max(x1) = x1 }[Real](0, 0)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.distance(x1) = x1.distance(x0) }[M](q.first, p.first)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.distance(x1) = x1.distance(x0) }[N](q.second, p.second)
function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0.first.distance(x1.first).max(x0.second.distance(x1.second)) = pair_distance[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[M, N](p, q)
function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0.first.distance(x1.first).max(x0.second.distance(x1.second)) = pair_distance[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[M, N](q, p)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](0, a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(0, a)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x1 = x2 }[Real](Real.lte, a, 0)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(pair_distance[M, N](p, q), 0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](pair_distance[M, N](p, q), 0)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 != x0.distance(x1) or x0 = x1 }[M](p1, q1)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 != x0.distance(x1) or x0 = x1 }[N](p2, q2)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0.distance(x1) <= x0.distance(x2) + x2.distance(x1) }[M](p1, r1, q1)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0.distance(x1) <= x0.distance(x2) + x2.distance(x1) }[N](p2, r2, q2)
function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0.first.distance(x1.first).max(x0.second.distance(x1.second)) = pair_distance[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[M, N](p, r)
